description: Detects Java classes with too many symbols, indicating a need to split responsibilities. Simplified from Rust: flags class symbols via select:symbol. Cannot apply the 10-non-accessor method threshold, composite score (methods + fields/2), Lombok annotation skip, framework annotation higher-threshold, or @SuppressWarnings suppression.

flag.message: class detected -- verify it does not have too many methods/fields (god class detection simplified: method counting not available in JSON DSL)
